'''zhagolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zahir|zahir]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-g-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zahir|zahir]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhagolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhægeleth|zhægeleth]] || [[word:zhægelej|zhægelej]] || [[word:zhægelesh|zhægelesh]] || [[word:zhægele|zhægele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhagogoloth|zhagogoloth]] || [[word:zhagogoloj|zhagogoloj]] || [[word:zhagogolosh|zhagogolosh]] || [[word:zhagogolo|zhagogolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhagoloth|zhagoloth]] || [[word:zhagoloj|zhagoloj]] || [[word:zhagolosh|zhagolosh]] || [[word:zhagolo|zhagolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhagofloth|zhagofloth]] || [[word:zhagofloj|zhagofloj]] || [[word:zhagoflosh|zhagoflosh]] || [[word:zhagoflof|zhagoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhagolotho|zhagolotho]] || [[word:zhagolojo|zhagolojo]] || [[word:zhagolosho|zhagolosho]] || [[word:zhagoloko|zhagoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhagoloth|zhagoloth]] || [[word:zhagoloj|zhagoloj]] || [[word:zhagolosh|zhagolosh]] || [[word:zhagolo|zhagolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhagolothol|zhagolothol]] || [[word:zhagolojol|zhagolojol]] || [[word:zhagoloshol|zhagoloshol]] || [[word:zhagolokol|zhagolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhagolothotho|zhagolothotho]] || [[word:zhagolojojo|zhagolojojo]] || [[word:zhagoloshosho|zhagoloshosho]] || [[word:zhagoloko|zhagoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhagolothon|zhagolothon]] || [[word:zhagolojon|zhagolojon]] || [[word:zhagoloshon|zhagoloshon]] || [[word:zhagolokon|zhagolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhagolothoro|zhagolothoro]] || [[word:zhagolojoro|zhagolojoro]] || [[word:zhagoloshoro|zhagoloshoro]] || [[word:zhagolokoro|zhagolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
